special_mechanics.name: Ladder Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Hart can climb ladders as a standard platforming movement option

special_mechanics.name: Crouching
special_mechanics.description: Hart can crouch and run while crouching

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Switching
special_mechanics.description: Hart can switch between three weapons: Laser whip (infinite), .44 Magnum revolver (limited), M-24 Stick grenades (limited)

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative/empirical data only. Sources document game structure and mechanics but contain no quantitative physics parameters (movement speeds, acceleration, gravity values, sub-pixel precision). Game mechanics are well-documented but underlying movement physics are not specified in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Vice: Project Doom (game features)
